title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾为标志，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Obra/Superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提高开发效率。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: ECC 是一个针对 Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor 等 AI 编码代理的性能优化系统，专注于技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system.
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development.
For Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随着用户成长而发展的智能代理项目，托管在 GitHub 上。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或云部署，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: ultraworkers/claw-code
content: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
summary: 一个由AI代理管理的博物馆展览项目，使用Rust语言和Gajae-Code/LazyCodex构建，完全无需人工干预进行开发和维护。
highlights: An agent-managed museum exhibit
built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex
developed and maintained with no human intervention

title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
content: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
summary: 一个基于Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱观察的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改进Claude Code行为。
highlights: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior
derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode 是一个开源编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能使用和构建 AI，提供工具以使用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
to use and to build on
provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.2, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，支持快速运行多种大型语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.6、GLM-5.2、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.2, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: A scorecard for the AI age
content: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.
summary: OpenAI首席财务官Sarah Friar提出AI时代记分卡，通过有用工作、成功任务成本、可靠性和计算回报来衡量AI投资回报率。
highlights: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard
measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute

title: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
content: Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships.
summary: OpenAI 正在通过年龄适宜的保护措施、学习工具、家长控制和专家合作，使 ChatGPT 对青少年更安全。
highlights: OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections
learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships

title: Fine-tune video and image models at scale with NVIDIA NeMo Automodel and 🤗 Diffusers
summary: 本文介绍了如何使用NVIDIA NeMo Automodel和Hugging Face Diffusers库大规模微调视频和图像模型，提供了技术细节和最佳实践。

title: Newer Models, Same Advantage
summary: 文章探讨了新一代AI模型在保持原有优势的同时，如何通过技术创新进一步提升性能，并分析了这些模型在多个应用场景中的表现。
highlights: Newer models demonstrate consistent advantages over previous versions.
Key innovations include improved efficiency and scalability.
Real-world applications show significant performance gains.
